perplexity_optimization_tactics: Prioritize extreme factual accuracy with verifiable citations.
Structure content using highly scannable Markdown formats (Headers, Bullet points).
Focus on answering direct 'Zero-Click' search intents in the first 100 words.
google_sge_parameters: Optimize for conversational long-tail conversational phrasing (e.g. 'How does X compare to Y').
Ensure robust Organization JSON-LD Schema to build entity authority.
Increase information gain by providing unique expert perspectives not found elsewhere.

semantic_keyword_density_targets.lsi_term_distribution: High. Scatter logically related entities naturally throughout the text.
